'''鈭歸-m-b''' ('''kawamab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quail|quail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quail|quail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| kawamab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamab|thiwamab]] || [[word:jiwamab|jiwamab]] || [[word:shiwamab|shiwamab]] || [[word:kiwamab|kiwamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwamab|thuthuwamab]] || [[word:jujuwamab|jujuwamab]] || [[word:shushuwamab|shushuwamab]] || [[word:kukuwamab|kukuwamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwamab|thuwamab]] || [[word:juwamab|juwamab]] || [[word:shuwamab|shuwamab]] || [[word:kuwamab|kuwamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwamab|thuwamab]] || [[word:juwamab|juwamab]] || [[word:shuwamab|shuwamab]] || [[word:kuwamab|kuwamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewamab|thewamab]] || [[word:jewamab|jewamab]] || [[word:shewamab|shewamab]] || [[word:kewamab|kewamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowamab|thothowamab]] || [[word:jojowamab|jojowamab]] || [[word:shoshowamab|shoshowamab]] || [[word:kokowamab|kokowamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowamab|thowamab]] || [[word:jowamab|jowamab]] || [[word:showamab|showamab]] || [[word:kowamab|kowamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowamab|thowamab]] || [[word:jowamab|jowamab]] || [[word:showamab|showamab]] || [[word:kowamab|kowamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wamab|th忙wamab]] || [[word:j忙wamab|j忙wamab]] || [[word:sh忙wamab|sh忙wamab]] || [[word:k忙wamab|k忙wamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawamab|thathawamab]] || [[word:jajawamab|jajawamab]] || [[word:shashawamab|shashawamab]] || [[word:kakawamab|kakawamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawamab|thawamab]] || [[word:jawamab|jawamab]] || [[word:shawamab|shawamab]] || [[word:kawamab|kawamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawamab|thawamab]] || [[word:jawamab|jawamab]] || [[word:shawamab|shawamab]] || [[word:kawamab|kawamab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawamab|shawamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawamab|goshawamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawamab|gokishawamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawamabn眉|shawamabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawamabnkn眉|goshawamabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamabn眉|gokishawamabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawamabsh毛|shawamabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawamabnksh毛|goshawamabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawamabsh毛|gokishawamabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamabro|shawamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamabnkro|goshawamabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamabro|gokishawamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamabmu|shawamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamabnkmu|goshawamabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamabmu|gokishawamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawamabsher|shawamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawamabnksher|goshawamabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawamabsher|gokishawamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawamabng|shawamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawamabnkng|goshawamabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawamabng|gokishawamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawamabya|shawamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawamabnkya|goshawamabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawamabya|gokishawamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawamabyam|shawamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawamabnkyam|goshawamabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawamabyam|gokishawamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamabn眉sh毛|shawamabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamabnkn眉sh毛|goshawamabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamabn眉sh毛|gokishawamabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamabn眉ro|shawamabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamabnkn眉ro|goshawamabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamabn眉ro|gokishawamabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamabn眉mu|shawamabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamabnkn眉mu|goshawamabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamabn眉mu|gokishawamabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamabsh毛n眉|shawamabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamabnksh毛n眉|goshawamabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamabsh毛n眉|gokishawamabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamabsh毛ro|shawamabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamabnksh毛ro|goshawamabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamabsh毛ro|gokishawamabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamabsh毛mu|shawamabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamabnksh毛mu|goshawamabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamabsh毛mu|gokishawamabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamabron眉|shawamabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamabnkron眉|goshawamabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamabron眉|gokishawamabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamabrosh毛|shawamabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamabnkrosh毛|goshawamabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamabrosh毛|gokishawamabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamabromu|shawamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamabnkromu|goshawamabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamabromu|gokishawamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamabmun眉|shawamabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamabnkmun眉|goshawamabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamabmun眉|gokishawamabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamabmush毛|shawamabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamabnkmush毛|goshawamabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamabmush毛|gokishawamabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamabmuro|shawamabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamabnkmuro|goshawamabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamabmuro|gokishawamabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
